description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test_build that runs in the default stage using the electronioncollider/eic-ubuntu-science:latest Docker image. The job executes the following shell commands in order: sudo python3 -m pip install --trusted-host pypi.python.org --trusted-host files.pythonhosted.org --trusted-host pypi.org --upgrade --force-reinstall ejpm; ejpm mergedb /container/app/ejpm_data/db.json > /dev/null; ejpm --top-dir=/home/eicuser; ejpm config global cxx_standard=17; ejpm config ejana branch=master; ejpm install ejana --force. No caches, artifacts, services, or rules are defined.
